title: Oberseminar: Towards Reliable and Efficient AI: Bayesian Neural Networks and Emerging Hardware
further_info: The Oberseminar will take place on Monday, 1:00 to 3:00 p.m.; Besprechungsraum 5.OG room 524. Please note that this is not the Seminar course. Credits for this course cannot be counted toward the master’s degree program; instead, upon successful completion, it will be listed in the transcript of records as an additional course.
